---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve? Who does it help? (Accessibility and
hearing-assist value are especially relevant.)

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Anything else — mockups, references, related projects (e.g. LibrePods/CAPod).
